pi_items.source: FITS header (FILTNAM1='F656N') and standard astronomical filter designations

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real FITS image of the Eagle Nebula (M16) downloaded from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator dataset. The FITS headers confirm the data was acquired using the Hubble Space Telescope's WFPC2 instrument through the F656N filter, isolating H-alpha emission. Analysis of the FITS file confirms the original mean pixel value is ~74.32, and the expected mean after applying the log(1+x)*10000 transformation is ~32802.89. The expected output file paths strictly align with the task instructions.
